title: Gain 5 Points
description: You feel great about yourself. Gain 5 points immediately.

title: Lose 3 Points
description: Oops. Lose 3 points. It happens to the best of us.

title: Give 5 Points to Any Player
description: Pick another player. They gain 5 points. Bask in their gratitude.

title: Steal 3 Points
description: Take 3 points from any player of your choice. They had too many anyway.

title: Skip Your Turn
description: You are overcome with indecision. Skip your next turn.

title: Skip the Next Player's Turn
description: The player to your left is suddenly very busy. They skip their next turn.

title: Reverse Turn Order
description: Everything is backwards now. Reverse the direction of play.

title: Draw 3 Cards
description: More cards! You draw 3 cards from the draw pile.

title: Everyone Draws 2
description: The generosity! All players (including you) draw 2 cards.

title: Discard Your Hand
description: Start fresh. Discard your entire hand, then draw 5 new cards.

title: Win the Game
description: Congratulations! You win immediately. The game is over. Really.

title: Person with Fewest Points Wins
description: New game rule: the player with the FEWEST points at game end wins instead.

title: Draw Bonus Rule
description: For the rest of the game, whenever a player takes their draw step, they gain 1 point.

title: Most Cards Drawn Wins
description: End the game now. The player or tied players who have drawn the most cards win.

steps.explanation: Use structured draw history and preserve every tied winner.

title: Targeted Turnaround
description: Choose a player. They lose 2 points and skip their next turn; you gain 2 points.

title: Basic Uno
description: Turn this game into basic Uno: draw 0 automatically, and the first player with no cards in hand wins immediately.

title: Red Card Rule
description: At the physical table, only red cards may be played while this rule remains in the center.

title: This Card is Worth 10 Points If You Keep It
description: Hold onto this card. At game end, it's worth 10 points — but only if you still have it.

title: Nothing Happens (Officially)
description: Play this card. Read it aloud. Nothing happens. Thank you for your participation.

args.note: Nothing happens. Thank you for your participation.

title: Spicy Uno
description: Use basic Uno ending and draw rules, color your remaining hand red, and shuffle Draw 2, Draw 4, and Reverse cards into the deck.

ops.title: Draw 2
ops.description: The next player draws 2 and skips their turn.

ops.title: Draw 4
ops.description: The next player draws 4 and skips their turn.

title: Card Counter
description: Draw 2 cards, then gain 1 point for every card now in your hand. The bigger your hand, the bigger the bonus.

steps.explanation: Read the hand only after the draw step has committed.

title: Sudden Death
description: New rule, effective immediately: whoever has the most points right now wins. The game is over.

title: Total Chaos
description: Absolute pandemonium: you gain 5 points, everyone else loses 3, everyone else skips their next turn, you take an extra turn, and every card currently in play is destroyed.

title: Wild Uno
description: Use Uno's empty-hand ending and zero-draw rule. Track the color of each played card and reject plays that do not match the current color.

title: Shuffle and Snatch
description: Scramble the turn order into chaos, then steal 4 points from whoever has the most.

title: Going Once, Going Twice
description: Everyone secretly bids points for this card. The highest bidder pays their bid and takes this card into their hand. Ties go to the earliest player in turn order.

request.prompt: How many points do you bid?

steps.code:
def apply(state, ctx):
    bids = ctx['interactions']['bids']
    best = max(bids.values())
    winner = [pid for pid in state.turn_order if bids[pid] == best][0]
    state.subtract_points('id:' + winner, int(best))
    state.transfer_card('this', 'id:' + winner)
steps.explanation: Resolve a sealed bid deterministically, charge the winner, and move the played card with the canonical transfer_card API.

title: Cat Show
description: Everyone draws a cat, then everyone votes for the best cat. The artist with the most votes gains 3 points; ties all score.

steps.explanation: Use a drawing barrier, materialize those sealed submissions as vote options, then score every tied winner.
